side_effects.description: Local area reaction at injection site, worsening with each subsequent dose starting around 8th injection
Severe hypotension with BP reading of 75/35 after 10th injection; near-fainting and loss of vision
Heart pounding extremely hard (tachycardia) after 10th injection
Lightheadedness, losing vision, nearly fainting after 10th injection; consistent with anaphylactic shock

protocol_notes: Used VIP for at least 10 injections. First 6-7 injections were tolerated fine. 8th injection caused local reaction. 9th had local reaction and more pronounced usual sides. 10th was severe anaphylactic-like reaction. Administered Benadryl (1/3 bottle) as emergency treatment. BP measured at 75/35 at nadir. Discontinued VIP use entirely. Has used many other peptides without reactions.
